title: elaeocarpus subisensis
intro: Elaeocarpus subisensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae, native to Papua New Guinea. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus subisensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as wounds and eczema. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
